testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Sort validation FAILED at position 3: ₹1449.0 should be <= ₹699.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 7: ₹1099.0 should be <= ₹699.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 9: ₹975.0 should be <= ₹799.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 10: ₹799.0 should be <= ₹699.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 12: ₹999.0 should be <= ₹799.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 13: ₹799.0 should be <= ₹699.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 16: ₹999.0 should be <= ₹975.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 18: ₹1075.0 should be <= ₹699.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 20: ₹799.0 should be <= ₹599.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 22: ₹1449.0 should be <= ₹1099.0 expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Sort validation FAILED at position 3: ₹1449.0 should be <= ₹699.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 7: ₹1099.0 should be <= ₹699.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 9: ₹975.0 should be <= ₹799.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 10: ₹799.0 should be <= ₹699.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 12: ₹999.0 should be <= ₹799.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 13: ₹799.0 should be <= ₹699.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 16: ₹999.0 should be <= ₹975.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 18: ₹1075.0 should be <= ₹699.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 20: ₹799.0 should be <= ₹599.0 expected [true] but found [false], Sort validation FAILED at position 22: ₹1449.0 should be <= ₹1099.0 expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:46) at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:30) at stepDefinations.D_BarcelonaJerseySortStep.prices_should_be_sorted_low_to_high(D_BarcelonaJerseySortStep.java:335) at ✽.prices should be sorted from low to high(file:///C:/Users/cartiace/Desktop/framework_project/src/test/resources/features/D_BarcelonaJerseySort.feature:17)
